name: MSI MAG B850M MORTAR WIFI Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x4 - Support DDR5-8200(OC) - 3x M.2 Slots - USB 20Gbps Type-C - HDMI 2.1 - Realtek 5Gb LAN - 802.11be Wi-Fi 7 - Bluetooth 5.4 (MAGB850MMORTARWIFI)
shortName: MSI MAG B850M MORTAR WIFI Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x
description: Compact Micro-ATX motherboard with AM5 socket and DDR5 support, featuring Wi-Fi 7 for gaming and content creation.
